name: Rollout Readiness Scorecard - Backstory Starter
description: Scores whether a customer stack is actually ready for workflow deployment before launch.

nodes.name: Readiness Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a readiness request for a workflow family, customer stack, and launch plan.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Keep readiness thresholds configurable so the same assessment model can support strict enterprise launches and lighter pilot programs.

nodes.name: Normalize Readiness Request

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $json.body || $json;
return [{ json: {
  workflowFamily: payload.workflowFamily || payload.workflow || 'Unknown Workflow',
  crm: payload.crm || 'unknown',
  meetingSource: payload.meetingSource || payload.noteTaker || 'unknown',
  delivery: payload.delivery || 'unknown',
  identityLayer: payload.identityLayer || 'unspecified',
  securityStatus: payload.securityStatus || 'unknown',
  operationalOwner: payload.operationalOwner || 'unassigned',
  blockers: payload.blockers || [],
  launchThreshold: $('Workflow Parameters').first().json.launchThreshold,
  pilotThreshold: $('Workflow Parameters').first().json.pilotThreshold,
  deliveryWebhookUrl: $('Workflow Parameters').first().json.deliveryWebhookUrl
} }];

nodes.notes: Convert the intake into a consistent readiness object across connectors, ownership, identity, security, and QA dimensions.

nodes.name: Score Readiness

options.systemMessage: You are a rollout readiness assessment assistant that decides whether a workflow can safely pilot or launch.

nodes.notes: Use this step to translate raw prerequisites into a go, pilot, or block recommendation with mitigation guidance.

nodes.name: Deliver Readiness Scorecard

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { workflowFamily: $json.workflowFamily, crm: $json.crm, delivery: $json.delivery, readiness: $json.output || $json.text || 'Readiness assessment required' } }}

nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, Jira, or another implementation planning surface for launch governance.
